title: Two Out of Three
titleCn: 至少在两个数组中出现的值

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,1,3,2], nums2 = [2,3], nums3 = [3] Output: [3,2] Explanation: The values that are present in at least two arrays are: - 3, in all three arrays. - 2, in nums1 and nums2.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,2] Explanation: The values that are present in at least two arrays are: - 3, in all three arrays. - 2, in nums1 and nums2.

testcases.input: nums1 = [3,1], nums2 = [2,3], nums3 = [1,2] Output: [2,3,1] Explanation: The values that are present in at least two arrays are: - 2, in nums2 and nums3. - 3, in nums1 and nums2. - 1, in nums1 and nums3.
testcases.expectedOutput: [2,3,1] Explanation: The values that are present in at least two arrays are: - 2, in nums2 and nums3. - 3, in nums1 and nums2. - 1, in nums1 and nums3.

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,2,2], nums2 = [4,3,3], nums3 = [5] Output: [] Explanation: No value is present in at least two arrays.
testcases.expectedOutput: [] Explanation: No value is present in at least two arrays.
